settings.heading: Lasts Up to 14 Days
settings.description: Chip-resistant formula that stays beautiful for up to two weeks with proper care.

settings.quote: I've tried every gel strip brand out there and nothing comes close. I love these designs so much and they actually stay on longer than my regular gel nails!
settings.author: - Renee E.

settings.quote: They look like salon nails but took me 15 minutes at home. No drying time, no fumes, and they actually last through dishes and workouts.
settings.author: - Talia I.

settings.quote: I was shocked at how gentle these are. No damage, no weird smell, just healthy nails that last way longer than I expected.
settings.author: - Riley E.

settings.callout_text: No Nasties, Just Nail Magic. We left out the top 10 most questionable ingredients—so you can shine without worry. That means no formaldehyde, HEMA, DBP, TPHP, or toluene. Ever.
Ditch the 2-hour waits, awkward small talk, tipping stress, and funky fumes. No nail drama. Just fast, flawless, feel-good nails that love you back.
Get salon-quality nails for just $38/month (or less), compared to $80+ with tipping at the salon. Save time, money and bye to nail breakage—all without sacrificing style or shine.

settings.subtitle: A New Standard in Nail Beauty.
settings.text: We're building a future where nail care is clean, expressive, and affordable. Our gel strips skip the toxins, cost less, and save you time—because beauty shouldn't come at your health or schedule.

settings.question: How long do they last?
settings.answer: Up to 14 days of chip-free shine. For best results, use the prep pad, apply on dry nails, and avoid oils or baths for 1-2 hours after. They're tough enough for everyday life—like a screen protector for your nails.

settings.question: How do I apply?
settings.answer: So easy! Find your strip size, peel & stick, then cure for 60 seconds. Trim or buff any excess. Voilà, salon-level nails in 15 minutes.

settings.question: Are they non-toxic?
settings.answer: No nasties, just nail magic. We skip the top 10 questionable ingredients—no HEMA, DBP, TPHP, toluene, or formaldehyde. Clean, safe, and worry-free.

settings.question: How do I remove them?
settings.answer: Gently lift with the provided wooden stick. For ideal results, use our Ctrl+Delete Vitamin Remover Serum for easy melt-off-the-nail removal. No damage, just nourished nails underneath.
